summary: Manual carrier-only closeout review approved PR #161 post-merge closeout content head e3e834a94837bc359cc3d126949941ca5a706fcd. This review covers only GH-105 closeout evidence and terminal carrier sync; it does not approve #110-#113 or #95 work.
reviewed_validation_summary: Post-merge closeout consumed implementation PR #161 (https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/pull/161), PR head `00ce8908aca27fe628b62b4c62fd4b4e86900076`, squash merge commit `c72e38619416454926fcc21380025d9c5edf7416`, target branch `main`, hosted run https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/actions/runs/28642506523, and issue closeout evidence for #105, #106, #107, #108, #109, and #94. Pre-merge validation passed `npm run typecheck`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-105 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-105 --json`, review read for `.loom/reviews/GH-105.json` and `.loom/reviews/GH-105.spec.json`, and PR metadata preflight. Hosted `py-compile`, `demo-bootstrap`, `repo-local-cli`, `loom-check`, and `loom-pr-merge-gate` passed on run `28642506523`. Local `loom build`, `loom review run`, `loom pr gate`, and `loom merge-ready` remain blocked by Loom suite CLI JSON consumption; no repo-local Loom shim was added.
follow_ups: #110-#113 remain for #95; GH-105 closeout does not start or complete #95.
Retire GH-105 current pointer to no_active_item before admitting the next Work Item.
Fix the Loom review-record / suite CLI JSON consumption surface outside this App closeout PR.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Closeout carrier consumes the merged PR, hosted run, issue closeout comments, and closed issue readback for #105-#109/#94. The diff is carrier-only and does not change App product/UI/docs behavior.
